title: Lebanon women's national ice hockey team
summary: The Lebanon women's national ice hockey team (Arabic: منتخب لبنان لهوكي الجليد للسيدات; French: Équipe du Liban féminine de hockey sur glace) is the national women's ice hockey team of Lebanon. The team is controlled by the Lebanese Ice Hockey Federation, and on 26 September 2019, became an associate member of the International Ice Hockey Federation (IIHF).
text: The Lebanon women's national ice hockey team (Arabic: منتخب لبنان لهوكي الجليد للسيدات; French: Équipe du Liban féminine de hockey sur glace) is the national women's ice hockey team of Lebanon. The team is controlled by the Lebanese Ice Hockey Federation, and on 26 September 2019, became an associate member of the International Ice Hockey Federation (IIHF).
